creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

> Are you sure the binary could work correctly?

I tested reged on an amd64 and had identical crashes 8-) 
See my error report to pnh@pogostick.net I forwarded to you.

> It may be able to be built and executed, but I'm not sure if it can
> manipulate hive correctly.

I had no chance to test it en detail.

There's one thing, a few warnings during compilation, all of them like:

ntreg.c: In function 'parse_db':
ntreg.c:660: warning: format '%04x' expects type 'unsigned int', but argument 2 has type 'long int'

I'm not sure this is critical.

-- 
pi@opsec.eu            +49 171 3101372                         8 years to go !
